title: Cadet Uniforms
body:
Cadet Uniform adds Armor that is based on Military Academy Uniforms all around the world - A cadet uniform is a standardized dress worn by members of the corps of cadets in various nations Military Academy.

UNIFORMS
-Cadet Commander
-Cadet Operations Officer
-Cadet Supply Officer
-Cadet Activities Officer
-Cadet Lieutenant
-Cadet Sergeant
-Cadet Corporal
-Cadet Private

**COMPATIBLE WITH VILLAGER RECRUITS MOD**
